positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with a valid session established
steps: Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the authenticated home page or dashboard is displayed
Verify the user's account name or profile indicator is visible on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh; user remains authenticated without being forced to log in again
steps: Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is NOT redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard/home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verify session persistence on page refresh
